expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

## Repo guidance

- After editing anything under `deploy/`, run `python3 scripts/check-config.py`.
- For sync pipeline changes, run `pytest tests/integration/test_sync.py -q`.
- Generated API clients live in `src/generated/`; extend them instead of hand-writing request/response types.

expectations.text: outputs/repo/AGENTS.md captures the deploy validation command, sync test command, and generated-client rule.

expectations.evidence:
# AGENTS.md

## Repo guidance

- After editing anything under `deploy/`, run `python3 scripts/check-config.py`.
- For sync pipeline changes, run `pytest tests/integration/test_sync.py -q`.
- Generated API clients live in `src/generated/`; extend them instead of hand-writing request/response types.

expectations.text: outputs/report.md includes Learnings and Applied updates.
expectations.evidence:
# Learnings

- `python3 scripts/check-config.py` - run after editing files under `deploy/`.
- `pytest tests/integration/test_sync.py -q` - run for sync pipeline changes.
- `src/generated/` - extend generated API clients/types instead of hand-writing request/response types.
- Excluded as non-durable: opening README first, laptop fan noise during a run.

# Applied updates

- Copied fixture repo into `outputs/repo/` (excluding `session_notes.md`).
- Reviewed instruction surface: one relevant `AGENTS.md` at repo root.
- No repo file edits required: existing `outputs/repo/AGENTS.md` already captured all durable learnings with correct project-wide scope.
